meta.name: coding.lower
meta.description: Coding-project L2 lower ontology — concrete subsystem classes (LSL, Constraints, Online learning, KM, ...) extending the L1 Component-hierarchy in coding-ontology.json

LiveLoggingSystem.description: Live Session Logging subsystem capturing time-windowed transcripts under .specstory/history/, including the ETM daemon and LSL resolver

ConstraintMonitor.description: Constraint monitor service on port 3030 that enforces project-level constraints (no-console-log, documentation-filename-format) and exposes a dashboard

OnlineObservation.description: Leaf-level observation artifact written by the online learning pipeline from a single prompt/response exchange

OnlineDigest.description: Daily roll-up of online observations into a digest artifact

OnlineInsight.description: Weekly synthesized insight artifact derived from online digests

KnowledgeManagement.description: Top-level knowledge subsystem comprising km-core, observations DB, JSON exports, and the Qdrant embedding sidecar

BatchSemanticAnalysis.description: Manual UKB wave-analysis pipeline (wave1/wave2/wave3 agents, persistence-agent, coordinator) — invoked via 'ukb full'

RapidLlmProxy.description: LLM routing surface on port 12435 with model-canonicalization, token-usage tracking, and per-process routing overrides

DockerizedServices.description: Docker-compose-managed services container (coding-services) hosting the dashboard, obs-api, lsl-resolver, semantic-analysis MCP server

EtmDaemon.description: Enhanced Transcript Monitor — launchd-managed com.coding.etm daemon under LiveLoggingSystem that watches transcripts and emits observations
